name: Library
summary: An almost empty afternoon library. The same person always sits by the window, reading a very thick novel that seems to have no ending.

details.mood: Quiet enough to hear pages turn. Outside the window, the shadow of a cherry tree sways across the pages.
features: The third desk by the window is practically someone's fixed seat.
On the return cart there is a novel that has been borrowed over and over, the lending card showing the same name.
When the librarian is away, it is so quiet here that time seems to stand still.
